description: Composition Charcoal grey puffer jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a front zipper closure, branded zipper, full sleeves, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, and two zippered pockets on the sides Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or iron on print/logo Dry in shade Warm iron This jacket from adidas is crafted from durable polyester fabric to wick sweat away from the body and offer exemplary comfort during strenuous training sessions. Pair it with sports shoes and trackpants to look your best while on the field and with t-shirts for casual comfort. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1” and shoulders 18.5”
